description_long: This stereo sound system features a rectangular, vertically-oriented cabinet with a dark wood grain finish on its sides and back, and a brushed metallic front panel. The front face displays two prominent circular speaker drivers: a larger woofer at the bottom and a smaller tweeter above it, both set within black, slightly recessed rings. There is a small circular port near the top left of the front panel, likely serving as a bass reflex port, and a tiny round indicator light or button in the upper right corner. The sides and back are smooth, with a rich, natural wood pattern, and no visible controls or connectors. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with clean lines and a sturdy, boxy form. This object would typically be found in urban environments such as home interiors, studios, or entertainment spaces.
description: A modern, boxy stereo speaker with a brushed metal front, two circular drivers, and dark wood grain sides and back. Minimalist design with a small port and indicator on the front.
description_view_0: The front view shows the brushed metal face with two speaker drivers, a bass reflex port, and a small indicator light.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the smooth, dark wood grain finish with no visible features or controls.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a continuous wood grain surface, unbroken by any ports or connectors.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the same uninterrupted wood grain finish.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grilles are circular and appear to have a fine mesh or woven fabric texture, with no visible decorative elements or geometric patterns.
